---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
page-title: false
---

::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](files/paru.jpg){style="border-radius: 16px; width: 60%;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}

Graduate student in University of Tokyo

Fields: IO, Environmental Economics, Development Economics

soyoka802@gmail.com

[cv](files/cv.pdf){target="_blank" rel="noopener" .btn .btn-primary .btn-cv}

:::
:::
